title: Richly Double Fried Egyptian Ovoli Mushroom Skillet
description: A briny and tender Egyptian dish featuring ovoli mushrooms, double fried for a crispy exterior and a low sodium friendly meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.
In a shallow dish, mix together the flour, cornstarch, paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, and salt free seasoning.
Dredge the sliced ovoli mushrooms in the flour mixture, shaking off excess.

Double fry the mushrooms by first frying them for 3 minutes on each side, then removing them from the oil and letting them cool for 5 minutes, and finally frying them again for an additional 2 minutes on each side.
Remove the mushrooms from the oil and place them on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
In the same skillet, add the lemon juice and chicken broth, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Return the mushrooms to the skillet and toss them in the lemon juice and chicken broth mixture.
Reduce heat to medium low and simmer the mushrooms in the skillet for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve the mushrooms hot, garnished with fresh parsley or thyme if desired.
